title: N004: Add Helm unittest suite for all templates
description:
**Size:** 📦 medium
**Category:** testing
**Priority:** high
**Source:** Proposed for 'Helm Chart Packaging

Chart structure under charts/'

Create a comprehensive helm-unittest test suite under charts/memcached-operator/tests/. Tests cover: default values rendering (all resources present with defaults), each toggle combination (webhook.enabled=false excludes webhook resources, certmanager.enabled=true includes cert-manager resources, serviceMonitor.enabled toggling, networkPolicy.enabled toggling, rbac.create=false excludes RBAC, crds.managedByHelm=true renders CRD template instead of relying on crds/ directory), deployment parameterization (custom image, replicas, resources, watchNamespaces arg injection), and label/selector correctness via _helpers.tpl.

**Rationale:** Chart correctness must be verified before CI integration. Helm-unittest runs without a cluster and catches template rendering issues, missing conditionals, and value propagation bugs. Testing all toggle combinations prevents broken installs when users customize values.

**Affected Areas:**
- charts/memcached-operator/tests/deployment_test.yaml
- charts/memcached-operator/tests/rbac_test.yaml
- charts/memcached-operator/tests/webhook_test.yaml
- charts/memcached-operator/tests/certmanager_test.yaml
- charts/memcached-operator/tests/servicemonitor_test.yaml
- charts/memcached-operator/tests/networkpolicy_test.yaml
- charts/memcached-operator/tests/crd_test.yaml

stories.title: Chart maintainer verifies all templates render with default values
stories.want: to run helm-unittest and confirm all templates render correctly with default values.yaml
stories.so_that: I know the chart produces a valid, complete set of Kubernetes resources out of the box
criteria: Running `helm unittest charts/memcached-operator` produces 0 failures

Default rendering test verifies exact document count per template (SA=1, Deployment=1, ClusterRole=2, LeaderElection=2, Metrics=3, NetworkPolicy=1, WebhookService=1, MutatingWH=1, ValidatingWH=1, Issuer=1, Certificate=1, ServiceMonitor=0, CRD-template=0)
Each template test file validates kind, apiVersion, metadata.name, metadata.namespace, and standard labels
Deployment test validates default image (controller:0.1.0), replicas (1), resources (cpu:500m/10m, memory:128Mi/64Mi), security context, probes, ports, and container args

stories.title: Chart maintainer validates toggle combinations exclude/include correct resources
stories.want: to verify that each values.yaml toggle (webhook.enabled, certmanager.enabled, serviceMonitor.enabled, networkPolicy.enabled, rbac.create, crds.managedByHelm) correctly gates its associated templates
stories.so_that: users who customize toggles get exactly the resources they expect without broken references
criteria: webhook.enabled=false produces 0 documents for webhook/service.yaml, webhook/mutatingwebhookconfiguration.yaml, webhook/validatingwebhookconfiguration.yaml, certmanager/issuer.yaml, certmanager/certificate.yaml
webhook.enabled=false removes webhook port 9443 and cert volume/volumeMount from Deployment, removes webhook port from NetworkPolicy ingress
certmanager.enabled=false produces 0 documents for certmanager/issuer.yaml and certmanager/certificate.yaml but keeps webhook templates rendering
certmanager.enabled=false removes cert-manager.io/inject-ca-from annotation from MutatingWebhookConfiguration and ValidatingWebhookConfiguration
serviceMonitor.enabled=true produces 1 ServiceMonitor document; false (default) produces 0
networkPolicy.enabled=false produces 0 documents for networkpolicy.yaml; true (default) produces 1
rbac.create=false produces 0 documents for all 3 RBAC template files (clusterrole, leader-election, metrics)
crds.managedByHelm=true produces 1 CRD document; false (default) produces 0

stories.title: Chart maintainer validates deployment parameterization
stories.want: to verify that all deployment parameters (image, replicas, resources, watchNamespaces, scheduling, security) are correctly templated
stories.so_that: users can customize the operator deployment to match their environment
criteria: Custom image.repository and image.tag override the default container image
Custom replicaCount overrides spec.replicas
Custom resources override container resource requests/limits
watchNamespaces list is joined with commas and injected as --watch-namespaces arg
leaderElection.enabled=false removes --leader-elect arg
imagePullSecrets are rendered when set, absent when empty
nodeSelector, tolerations, and affinity are rendered when set, absent when empty
Pod and container security contexts match values.yaml defaults (runAsNonRoot, readOnlyRootFilesystem, drop ALL)

stories.title: Chart maintainer verifies label and selector correctness via _helpers.tpl
stories.want: to validate that all helper template functions produce correct labels, names, and selectors
stories.so_that: Kubernetes label selectors match across Deployments, Services, NetworkPolicies, and ServiceMonitors
criteria: memcached-operator.fullname produces release-chartname by default, uses release name when it contains chart name, uses fullnameOverride when set, truncates at 63 chars
memcached-operator.name uses chart name by default, nameOverride when set
memcached-operator.labels includes helm.sh/chart, app.kubernetes.io/name, instance, version, managed-by
memcached-operator.selectorLabels includes only name and instance (subset of full labels)
control-plane: controller-manager label appears on Deployment metadata, pod template, and selector matchLabels
Deployment spec.selector.matchLabels matches pod template labels (selectorLabels + control-plane)

stories.title: Chart maintainer verifies cross-template consistency with fullnameOverride and serviceAccount.name
stories.want: to verify that fullnameOverride and custom serviceAccount.name propagate consistently across all templates
stories.so_that: all resource names, role binding subjects, cert DNS names, and webhook service references remain consistent when overrides are used
criteria: fullnameOverride propagates to Deployment, ServiceAccount, all RBAC resources, webhook Service, webhook configs, cert-manager resources, ServiceMonitor, NetworkPolicy names
Custom serviceAccount.name propagates to ServiceAccount metadata.name, Deployment serviceAccountName, and all RoleBinding/ClusterRoleBinding subjects
serviceAccount.create=false sets Deployment serviceAccountName to 'default' (when no custom name)
Webhook configs reference the correct webhook service name derived from fullnameOverride
cert-manager.io/inject-ca-from annotation references correct namespace/certificate-name combination

stories.title: Chart maintainer validates NOTES.txt reflects toggle states
stories.want: to verify that NOTES.txt output correctly reflects enabled/disabled component states and shows appropriate warnings
stories.so_that: users see accurate post-install instructions including CRD management mode, RBAC status, webhook status, and cert-manager warnings
criteria: Default NOTES.txt shows correct fullname, CRD management mode (crds/ directory default), RBAC Helm-managed, webhooks enabled, cert-manager enabled
crds.managedByHelm=true changes CRD management message to Helm-managed
rbac.create=false shows RBAC warning
webhook.enabled=false shows webhooks disabled
webhook.enabled=true with certmanager.enabled=false shows manual TLS warning
serviceMonitor.enabled=true shows ServiceMonitor enabled

requirements.description: The test suite SHALL verify that all templates render the correct number of documents and correct kind/apiVersion with default values
requirements.rationale: Ensures the chart produces a complete, valid set of resources out of the box without any value overrides

scenarios.name: Default rendering produces expected document counts
scenarios.when: helm-unittest runs with no value overrides
scenarios.then: each template produces the expected document count (SA=1, Deployment=1, ClusterRole=2, LeaderElection=2, Metrics=3, NetworkPolicy=1, WebhookService=1, MutatingWH=1, ValidatingWH=1, Issuer=1, Certificate=1, ServiceMonitor=0, CRD-template=0)
and_then: every document has correct kind and apiVersion

scenarios.name: Each document has correct metadata.name and namespace
scenarios.when: helm-unittest runs with release name 'test-release' in namespace 'test-ns'
scenarios.then: metadata.name uses the fullname helper pattern (test-release-memcached-operator[-suffix])

scenarios.name: Each document includes standard Helm labels
scenarios.then: metadata.labels includes helm.sh/chart, app.kubernetes.io/name, instance, version, managed-by

requirements.description: The test suite SHALL verify that webhook.enabled=false excludes all webhook resources and removes webhook artifacts from Deployment and NetworkPolicy
requirements.rationale: Users who don't need webhooks must be able to disable them without leftover ports, volumes, or broken references

scenarios.name: webhook.enabled=false suppresses webhook templates
scenarios.then: webhook/service.yaml, webhook/mutatingwebhookconfiguration.yaml, webhook/validatingwebhookconfiguration.yaml produce 0 documents
and_then: certmanager/issuer.yaml and certmanager/certificate.yaml also produce 0 documents

scenarios.name: webhook.enabled=false cleans Deployment
scenarios.then: Deployment does not contain webhook-server port 9443, no volumeMounts, no volumes
and_then: health port 8081 and metrics port 8443 are still present

scenarios.name: webhook.enabled=false cleans NetworkPolicy
scenarios.then: NetworkPolicy ingress does not contain port 9443
and_then: health port 8081 and metrics port 8443 are still present in ingress

requirements.description: The test suite SHALL verify that certmanager.enabled toggle independently controls cert-manager resources and webhook annotations
requirements.rationale: Users may want webhooks without cert-manager (manual TLS provisioning) or with cert-manager for automated TLS

scenarios.name: certmanager.enabled=false suppresses cert-manager templates
scenarios.when: certmanager.enabled is set to false (webhook.enabled remains true)
scenarios.then: certmanager/issuer.yaml and certmanager/certificate.yaml produce 0 documents

scenarios.name: certmanager.enabled=false removes inject-ca-from annotation
scenarios.then: MutatingWebhookConfiguration and ValidatingWebhookConfiguration have no metadata.annotations

scenarios.name: Both webhook and certmanager enabled renders cert-manager annotation
scenarios.when: both webhook.enabled and certmanager.enabled are true (defaults)
scenarios.then: MutatingWebhookConfiguration and ValidatingWebhookConfiguration have cert-manager.io/inject-ca-from annotation referencing namespace/certificate-name

requirements.description: The test suite SHALL verify that serviceMonitor.enabled toggle controls ServiceMonitor rendering and validates all endpoint configuration
requirements.rationale: ServiceMonitor is disabled by default and must render correctly with all optional fields when enabled

scenarios.name: serviceMonitor.enabled=false produces no document
scenarios.then: servicemonitor.yaml produces 0 documents

scenarios.name: serviceMonitor.enabled=true produces correct ServiceMonitor
scenarios.then: 1 ServiceMonitor document with correct endpoint config (path /metrics, port metrics, scheme https)

scenarios.name: Optional interval, scrapeTimeout, and additionalLabels rendered when set
scenarios.when: serviceMonitor.enabled=true with interval, scrapeTimeout, and additionalLabels configured
scenarios.then: endpoint includes interval and scrapeTimeout; metadata.labels includes additionalLabels
and_then: these fields are absent when not configured

requirements.description: The test suite SHALL verify that networkPolicy.enabled, rbac.create, and leaderElection.enabled toggles independently control their resources
requirements.rationale: Each toggle must independently gate its resources without side effects on other templates

scenarios.name: networkPolicy.enabled=false suppresses NetworkPolicy
scenarios.then: networkpolicy.yaml produces 0 documents

scenarios.name: rbac.create=false suppresses all RBAC
scenarios.then: clusterrole.yaml, leader-election-role.yaml, and metrics-role.yaml all produce 0 documents

scenarios.name: leaderElection.enabled=false suppresses leader-election RBAC and removes --leader-elect arg
scenarios.then: leader-election-role.yaml produces 0 documents and Deployment args do not contain --leader-elect

requirements.description: The test suite SHALL verify crds.managedByHelm toggle and CRD spec field correctness
requirements.rationale: CRD management strategy must be explicitly toggled and produce valid CRD with correct group/kind/scope

scenarios.name: crds.managedByHelm=false produces no CRD template
scenarios.then: crd-template.yaml produces 0 documents

scenarios.name: crds.managedByHelm=true renders valid CRD
scenarios.then: 1 CustomResourceDefinition with spec.group=memcached.c5c3.io, names.kind=Memcached, names.plural=memcacheds, scope=Namespaced
and_then: standard Helm labels present on CRD

scenarios.name: CRD name follows Kubernetes convention
scenarios.then: metadata.name is 'memcacheds.memcached.c5c3.io' (plural.group format)

requirements.description: The test suite SHALL verify Deployment parameterization for image, replicas, resources, args, scheduling, and security
requirements.rationale: The Deployment is the most parameterized template; thorough testing prevents misconfiguration

scenarios.name: Custom image overrides default
scenarios.then: container image is 'ghcr.io/my-org/my-operator:v2.0.0'
and_then: imagePullPolicy and imagePullSecrets are also customizable

scenarios.name: watchNamespaces injects --watch-namespaces arg
scenarios.then: container args include '--watch-namespaces=ns1,ns2'
and_then: arg is absent when watchNamespaces is empty

scenarios.name: Security contexts match restricted pod security standards
scenarios.then: pod securityContext has runAsNonRoot=true, runAsUser=65532, seccompProfile.type=RuntimeDefault; container securityContext has allowPrivilegeEscalation=false, readOnlyRootFilesystem=true, capabilities.drop=[ALL]

requirements.description: The test suite SHALL verify _helpers.tpl functions produce correct labels, names, and selectors across all templates
requirements.rationale: Helper functions are shared infrastructure; bugs cascade to every resource in the chart

scenarios.name: fullname with defaults, overrides, and truncation
scenarios.when: various combinations of release name, nameOverride, and fullnameOverride
scenarios.then: fullname produces expected values and truncates at 63 chars

scenarios.name: selectorLabels are subset of labels
scenarios.then: selectorLabels include only name and instance; labels include all 5 standard labels

scenarios.name: serviceAccountName helper respects create toggle and custom name
scenarios.then: serviceAccountName returns 'default'
and_then: with custom name, returns the custom name regardless of create flag

requirements.description: The test suite SHALL verify cross-template reference consistency when fullnameOverride and serviceAccount.name are customized
requirements.rationale: Inconsistent names between templates cause runtime failures (broken RoleBindings, webhook service references, cert DNS mismatches)

scenarios.name: fullnameOverride propagates to all resource names
scenarios.then: all resources use 'my-custom-name' as name prefix with correct suffixes

scenarios.name: serviceAccount.name propagates to all binding subjects
scenarios.then: all ClusterRoleBinding and RoleBinding subjects[0].name is 'my-sa'

scenarios.name: Webhook configs reference correct service and cert names with overrides
scenarios.then: webhook clientConfig.service.name matches webhook Service name; cert-manager annotation references correct certificate name

requirements.description: The test suite SHALL verify RBAC rules contain exact verb sets and resource targets matching operator requirements
requirements.rationale: Incorrect RBAC causes operator permission failures or grants excessive privileges

scenarios.name: ClusterRole has 11 rules with correct verbs
scenarios.then: rules count is 11; memcacheds gets full CRUD, secrets gets read-only, events gets create/patch

scenarios.name: Leader-election Role has 3 rules
scenarios.then: configmaps and leases get full CRUD; events gets create/patch

scenarios.name: Metrics roles have correct structure
scenarios.then: 3 documents: metrics-auth-role (2 rules), metrics-auth-rolebinding, metrics-reader (1 rule for /metrics nonResourceURL)

requirements.description: The test suite SHALL verify NOTES.txt reflects toggle states and shows appropriate warnings
requirements.rationale: Post-install notes guide users; stale or incorrect info causes confusion

scenarios.name: Default NOTES shows correct component status
scenarios.then: shows CRD crds/ directory management, RBAC Helm-managed, webhooks enabled, cert-manager enabled

scenarios.name: Warning for webhook without cert-manager
scenarios.then: NOTES includes WARNING about manual TLS provisioning

scenarios.name: Warning for disabled RBAC
scenarios.then: NOTES includes WARNING about manually creating RBAC

requirements.description: The test suite SHALL verify serviceAccount.create toggle and annotation propagation
requirements.rationale: ServiceAccount creation and naming must be toggleable for environments with pre-provisioned accounts

scenarios.name: serviceAccount.create=false suppresses SA
scenarios.then: serviceaccount.yaml produces 0 documents; Deployment uses serviceAccountName 'default'

scenarios.name: Custom name overrides generated name
scenarios.then: SA metadata.name and Deployment serviceAccountName are both 'custom-sa'

scenarios.name: Annotations rendered when set, absent when not
scenarios.then: SA metadata.annotations includes specified annotations

tasks.title: Create Deployment template test suite with default rendering, container args, custom image, security context, scheduling, and conditional webhook ports/volumes (REQ-001, REQ-002, REQ-007)
tasks.description: Create charts/memcached-operator/tests/deployment_test.yaml. Test suites: (1) Default rendering - document count, kind/apiVersion, replicas=1, image=controller:0.1.0, pullPolicy=Always, default resources, serviceAccountName, metadata+pod template labels, selector labels, namespace, container name/command, ports (health 8081, metrics 8443), probes (liveness /healthz:8081, readiness /readyz:8081), pod annotation default-container, terminationGracePeriodSeconds=10. (2) Container args - --leader-elect present by default/absent when false, --health-probe-bind-address, --metrics-bind-address, --metrics-secure always present, --watch-namespaces absent by default/present when set. (3) Custom image - custom tag, custom repository+tag, imagePullSecrets when set/absent by default, custom pullPolicy. (4) Security context - podSecurityContext (runAsNonRoot, runAsUser 65532, seccompProfile), containerSecurityContext (allowPrivilegeEscalation false, readOnlyRootFilesystem true, drop ALL). (5) Scheduling - nodeSelector/tolerations/affinity absent by default, rendered when set. (6) Conditional webhook - port 9443 present/absent, volumeMounts present/absent, volumes present/absent based on webhook.enabled, fullnameOverride propagates to cert volume secretName.

tasks.title: Create ServiceAccount template test suite with create toggle, naming, labels, and annotations (REQ-001, REQ-012)
tasks.description: Create charts/memcached-operator/tests/serviceaccount_test.yaml. Tests: serviceAccount.create=true (default) renders 1 document, create=false renders 0; correct kind/apiVersion; name from fullname by default, custom serviceAccount.name when set; namespace from release; standard labels (all 5); managed-by=Helm; annotations absent by default, rendered when set (single + multiple annotations).

tasks.title: Create RBAC ClusterRole + ClusterRoleBinding test suite with toggle, rules validation, and binding references (REQ-005, REQ-010)
tasks.description: Create charts/memcached-operator/tests/rbac_clusterrole_test.yaml. Tests: rbac.create=true renders 2 documents, false renders 0; ClusterRole (doc 0): correct kind/apiVersion, name with -manager-role suffix, standard labels, exactly 11 rules (memcacheds CRUD, status, finalizers, deployments, services, PDBs, networkpolicies, servicemonitors, HPAs, secrets read-only, events create/patch). ClusterRoleBinding (doc 1): correct kind/apiVersion, name with -manager-rolebinding suffix, roleRef to ClusterRole, subjects bind to SA in release namespace, standard labels.

tasks.title: Create RBAC leader-election Role + RoleBinding test suite with dual toggle and rules validation (REQ-005, REQ-010)
tasks.description: Create charts/memcached-operator/tests/rbac_leader_election_test.yaml. Tests: both rbac.create AND leaderElection.enabled must be true to render (4 combinations tested); Role (doc 0): kind/apiVersion, name with -leader-election-role suffix, namespace, standard labels, exactly 3 rules (configmaps CRUD, leases CRUD, events create/patch); RoleBinding (doc 1): kind/apiVersion, name with -leader-election-rolebinding suffix, namespace, roleRef to Role, subjects bind to SA in release namespace, standard labels.

tasks.title: Create RBAC metrics auth roles test suite with 3-document structure and rules (REQ-005, REQ-010)
tasks.description: Create charts/memcached-operator/tests/rbac_metrics_test.yaml. Tests: rbac.create=true renders 3 documents, false renders 0; metrics-auth-role ClusterRole (doc 0): kind/apiVersion, name, labels, 2 rules (tokenreviews create, subjectaccessreviews create); metrics-auth-rolebinding ClusterRoleBinding (doc 1): kind/apiVersion, name, roleRef, subjects, labels; metrics-reader ClusterRole (doc 2): kind/apiVersion, name, labels, 1 rule (get /metrics nonResourceURL).

tasks.title: Create Webhook Service template test suite with toggle, ports, and selector (REQ-001, REQ-002)
tasks.description: Create charts/memcached-operator/tests/webhook_service_test.yaml. Tests: webhook.enabled=true (default) renders 1 doc, false renders 0; correct kind/apiVersion; name using webhookServiceName helper (fullname-webhook); namespace; standard labels; port 443 targeting 9443; selector includes selectorLabels plus control-plane=controller-manager.

tasks.title: Create MutatingWebhookConfiguration test suite with toggle, cert-manager annotation, config, and rules (REQ-002, REQ-003)
tasks.description: Create charts/memcached-operator/tests/webhook_mutating_test.yaml. Tests: webhook.enabled=true renders 1 doc, false renders 0; kind/apiVersion; name with -mutating suffix; standard labels; cert-manager annotation present when certmanager.enabled=true, absent when false; webhook name mmemcached-v1beta1.kb.io, path /mutate-memcached-c5c3-io-v1beta1-memcached, service name/namespace from helpers, failurePolicy Fail, admissionReviewVersions includes v1, sideEffects None; rules target memcached.c5c3.io, v1beta1, CREATE+UPDATE, memcacheds.

tasks.title: Create ValidatingWebhookConfiguration test suite with toggle, cert-manager annotation, config, and rules (REQ-002, REQ-003)
tasks.description: Create charts/memcached-operator/tests/webhook_validating_test.yaml. Tests: webhook.enabled=true renders 1 doc, false renders 0; kind/apiVersion; name with -validating suffix; standard labels; cert-manager annotation present/absent based on certmanager.enabled; webhook name vmemcached-v1beta1.kb.io, path /validate-memcached-c5c3-io-v1beta1-memcached, service name/namespace, failurePolicy Fail, admissionReviewVersions v1, sideEffects None; rules target memcached.c5c3.io v1beta1 CREATE+UPDATE memcacheds.

tasks.title: Create cert-manager Certificate and Issuer test suites with dual toggle, DNS names, issuer ref, and secret name (REQ-003, REQ-006)
tasks.description: Create charts/memcached-operator/tests/certmanager_certificate_test.yaml and certmanager_issuer_test.yaml. Certificate tests: requires both webhook.enabled AND certmanager.enabled (3 toggle combos); kind/apiVersion cert-manager.io/v1; name with -webhook-cert suffix; namespace; standard labels; dnsNames with .svc and .svc.cluster.local suffixes; issuerRef.kind=Issuer, name from fullname-selfsigned-issuer; privateKey.rotationPolicy=Always; secretName with -webhook-cert-secret suffix. Issuer tests: same dual toggle; kind/apiVersion; name with -selfsigned-issuer suffix; namespace; labels; spec.selfSigned={}.

tasks.title: Create ServiceMonitor template test suite with toggle, endpoint config, optional fields, and selector (REQ-004)
tasks.description: Create charts/memcached-operator/tests/servicemonitor_test.yaml. Tests: serviceMonitor.enabled=false (default) renders 0, true renders 1; kind/apiVersion monitoring.coreos.com/v1; name with -metrics suffix; namespace; standard labels plus control-plane; additionalLabels merged when set; endpoint: path=/metrics, port=metrics, scheme=https, bearerTokenFile, tlsConfig.insecureSkipVerify=true; interval absent by default/present when set; scrapeTimeout absent/present; selector.matchLabels includes selectorLabels + control-plane.

tasks.title: Create NetworkPolicy template test suite with toggle, pod selector, policy types, conditional webhook port, and egress (REQ-002, REQ-005)
tasks.description: Create charts/memcached-operator/tests/networkpolicy_test.yaml. Tests: networkPolicy.enabled=true (default) renders 1, false renders 0; kind/apiVersion networking.k8s.io/v1; name, namespace, standard labels; podSelector uses selectorLabels + control-plane; policyTypes include Ingress and Egress; ingress includes health 8081 and metrics 8443 ports; webhook port 9443 present when webhook.enabled=true, absent when false; health+metrics ports remain when webhook disabled; egress allows all (empty rule {}); fullnameOverride propagation.

tasks.title: Create CRD template test suite with managedByHelm toggle and CRD spec validation, plus Chart metadata/NOTES.txt tests (REQ-006, REQ-011)
tasks.description: Create charts/memcached-operator/tests/crd_template_test.yaml and chart_metadata_test.yaml. CRD template tests: managedByHelm=false renders 0, true renders 1; kind CustomResourceDefinition, apiVersion apiextensions.k8s.io/v1; name memcacheds.memcached.c5c3.io; standard Helm labels with exact chart label value; spec.group, names.kind/plural, scope. Chart metadata tests: NOTES.txt with default fullname, CRD management mode (crds/ directory default vs Helm-managed), selector labels in kubectl command, ServiceAccount name (default/custom), RBAC status/warning, webhook/cert-manager status/warnings, ServiceMonitor status.

tasks.title: Create _helpers.tpl label/name/selector function tests via proxy template (REQ-008)
tasks.description: Create charts/memcached-operator/tests/helpers_test.yaml. Tests use crd-template.yaml (with managedByHelm=true) and NOTES.txt as proxy templates to verify helper output. Tests: memcached-operator.name uses chart name by default, nameOverride when set; memcached-operator.chart formats as name-version; memcached-operator.labels includes all 5 standard labels with correct values; selectorLabels subset (name + instance); memcached-operator.fullname default (release-chartname), release name containing chart name, fullnameOverride, truncation at 63 chars; memcached-operator.selectorLabelsKubectl for kubectl -l flag.

tasks.title: Create cross-template integration test suite validating resource counts, toggle combinations, fullnameOverride propagation, and cross-references (REQ-001, REQ-002, REQ-003, REQ-005, REQ-009)
tasks.description: Create charts/memcached-operator/tests/integration_test.yaml rendering ALL templates simultaneously. Tests: (1) Default rendering produces correct total across all templates (15 resources); (2) rbac.create=false suppresses all 7 RBAC docs, others unchanged; (3) serviceAccount.create=false suppresses SA, Deployment serviceAccountName='default'; (4) fullnameOverride propagates to all resource names (Deployment, SA, all RBAC, webhook Service, webhook configs, cert-manager, ServiceMonitor, NetworkPolicy); (5) serviceAccount.name propagates to SA, Deployment, all binding subjects; (6) webhook.enabled=false suppresses webhook+certmanager templates, removes webhook port from Deployment and NetworkPolicy; (7) certmanager.enabled=false suppresses cert-manager but keeps webhooks; (8) serviceMonitor.enabled=true adds ServiceMonitor; (9) fullnameOverride propagates to new resources; (10) cross-references: webhook configs reference correct service name, cert-manager annotation references correct certificate name with fullnameOverride.

tasks.title: Write reference documentation for helm-unittest test suite structure (REQ-001)
tasks.description: Create docs/reference/backend/helm-unittest-test-suite.md documenting: test file organization (per-template files + integration file), naming conventions (*_test.yaml), test patterns used (hasDocuments for toggles, equal/contains for values, isKind/isAPIVersion for type checks, notExists/notContains for absence), how to run tests locally, how to add tests for new templates, toggle coverage matrix showing which test files cover which values.yaml toggles.

test_specifications.test_function: should render one Deployment document
test_specifications.story: Chart maintainer verifies all templates render with default values
test_specifications.expected: Default values produce exactly 1 Deployment document with kind Deployment and apiVersion apps/v1

test_specifications.test_function: should set default image to controller:0.1.0
test_specifications.story: Chart maintainer verifies all templates render with default values
test_specifications.expected: Container image is controller:0.1.0 using chart appVersion as tag default

test_specifications.test_function: should not include webhook-server port when webhook.enabled is false
test_specifications.story: Chart maintainer validates toggle combinations exclude/include correct resources
test_specifications.expected: Port 9443 is absent from container ports when webhook.enabled=false

test_specifications.test_function: should not include volumeMounts when webhook.enabled is false
test_specifications.story: Chart maintainer validates toggle combinations exclude/include correct resources
test_specifications.expected: No volumeMounts or volumes exist when webhook.enabled=false

test_specifications.test_function: should use custom repository and tag
test_specifications.story: Chart maintainer validates deployment parameterization
test_specifications.expected: Custom image.repository and image.tag produce correct container image string

test_specifications.test_function: should include --watch-namespaces when watchNamespaces is set
test_specifications.story: Chart maintainer validates deployment parameterization
test_specifications.expected: watchNamespaces=['ns1','ns2'] produces --watch-namespaces=ns1,ns2 arg

test_specifications.test_function: should set default podSecurityContext with runAsNonRoot
test_specifications.story: Chart maintainer validates deployment parameterization
test_specifications.expected: Pod security context matches restricted profile defaults

test_specifications.test_function: should not render ServiceAccount when serviceAccount.create is false
test_specifications.story: Chart maintainer validates toggle combinations exclude/include correct resources
test_specifications.expected: serviceAccount.create=false produces 0 documents

test_specifications.test_function: should use serviceAccount.name when set
test_specifications.story: Chart maintainer verifies cross-template consistency
test_specifications.expected: Custom serviceAccount.name overrides generated name in SA metadata

test_specifications.test_function: should not render any documents when rbac.create is false
test_specifications.story: Chart maintainer validates toggle combinations exclude/include correct resources
test_specifications.expected: rbac.create=false produces 0 documents for ClusterRole template

test_specifications.test_function: should have exactly 11 RBAC rules
test_specifications.story: Chart maintainer verifies all templates render with default values
test_specifications.expected: ClusterRole has exactly 11 rules matching operator RBAC requirements

test_specifications.test_function: should not render when leaderElection.enabled is false
test_specifications.story: Chart maintainer validates toggle combinations exclude/include correct resources
test_specifications.expected: leaderElection.enabled=false suppresses leader-election RBAC even when rbac.create=true

review_criteria: All helm-unittest test files follow existing naming convention (*_test.yaml) and structure (suite/templates/release/tests)
Every template file has at least one dedicated test file covering: document count, kind/apiVersion, metadata (name, namespace, labels), and all conditional logic

Every values.yaml toggle (webhook.enabled, certmanager.enabled, serviceMonitor.enabled, networkPolicy.enabled, rbac.create, leaderElection.enabled, serviceAccount.create, crds.managedByHelm) has tests for both true and false states

Integration test file renders ALL templates simultaneously and validates cross-template consistency (resource counts, fullnameOverride propagation, serviceAccount.name propagation, webhook cross-references)
Test specifications cover toggle combinations where one toggle affects multiple templates (e.g., webhook.enabled=false affects 5 templates + Deployment + NetworkPolicy)
RBAC tests validate exact rule counts and verb sets to catch permission drift
All test files use consistent release metadata (name: test-release, namespace: test-ns) for predictable assertion values
Reference documentation exists at docs/reference/backend/helm-unittest-test-suite.md covering test structure, patterns, and how to extend
implementation_notes:
**Architecture**: Each template gets its own test file for isolated testing. A single integration_test.yaml renders all templates simultaneously for cross-template validation. Helper functions are tested indirectly via proxy templates (crd-template.yaml for labels, NOTES.txt for fullname).

**Test patterns**: (1) hasDocuments for toggle gating (count: 0 when disabled, count: N when enabled). (2) isKind/isAPIVersion for type validation. (3) equal for exact value matching. (4) contains for array/list membership. (5) notExists/notContains for absence verification. (6) matchRegexRaw for NOTES.txt text matching. (7) documentIndex for multi-document templates (RBAC files produce 2-3 documents).

**Toggle coverage matrix**: webhook.enabled affects: webhook/*, certmanager/*, deployment (ports/volumes), networkpolicy (ingress ports). certmanager.enabled affects: certmanager/*, webhook annotations. serviceMonitor.enabled affects: servicemonitor.yaml. networkPolicy.enabled affects: networkpolicy.yaml. rbac.create affects: rbac/*. leaderElection.enabled affects: rbac/leader-election-role.yaml, deployment args. serviceAccount.create affects: serviceaccount.yaml, deployment serviceAccountName. crds.managedByHelm affects: crd-template.yaml.

**Key files**: templates/_helpers.tpl defines all shared helpers (fullname, name, labels, selectorLabels, serviceAccountName, webhookServiceName, webhookCertName, webhookCertSecretName). values.yaml defines all toggles and their defaults. All test files use release name 'test-release' in namespace 'test-ns' with chart appVersion '0.1.0' for consistent, predictable assertion values.

**Risks**: (1) helm-unittest plugin version compatibility - pin to v0.5.x or later. (2) Multi-document template ordering - use documentIndex consistently. (3) NOTES.txt regex assertions may be fragile if NOTES format changes.
